duplicate_research_check: The idea studies transition uncertainty rather than the direction of volatility transitions.
falsifiability_assessment: Fixed transition windows and settled-regime controls make the stability claim falsifiable.
data_readiness_assessment: The approved Development artifacts support descriptive regime labels without new data.
leakage_and_overfit_risks: Regime estimator lag can create circular transition labels.
transaction_cost_challenge: No execution is authorized; future transitions may also coincide with wider spreads.
strongest_counterevidence: Lower transition stability may be an artifact of estimator lag rather than a market mechanism.
alternative_explanations: Volatility alone may explain the apparent transition penalty.
score_adjustments: Apply medium risk, high compute, and medium contamination penalties.
